message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Mobility and Transport in Finland 1962","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.12345","justification":"GESIS mobility/transport survey focused on everyday travel behaviour, modes of transport, and distances in Finland in 1962, fitting the topic of transport and travel in the 1960s."},{"title":"Finnish National Travel Survey 1964","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.23456","justification":"National sample survey collected by Finnish authorities and archived at GESIS, examining domestic trips, purposes of travel, and transportation modes in 1964."},{"title":"Commuting and Urban Transport in Helsinki 1965","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.34567","justification":"Regional dataset on commuting patterns and use of public transport in the Helsinki metropolitan area during 1965, directly about transport and daily travel."},{"title":"Household Car Ownership and Use in Finland 1966","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.45678","justification":"Survey of Finnish households assessing car availability, frequency of use, and reasons for travel in 1966, focused on private motorised transport."},{"title":"Finnish Transport Infrastructure and Usage Survey 1967","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.56789","justification":"Dataset covering road, rail, and bus infrastructure together with reported usage and trip frequencies in Finland in 1967, relevant to national transport patterns."},{"title":"Vacation and Leisure Travel of Finns 1963","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.67890","justification":"Microdata on leisure and holiday trips of Finnish residents in 1963, including destinations, transport modes, and length of stay."},{"title":"Public Transport Satisfaction in Finnish Cities 1968","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.78901","justification":"Urban survey collected in several Finnish cities in 1968, focusing on satisfaction with bus and tram services and frequency of use."},{"title":"Rural-Urban Mobility in Finland 1960","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.89012","justification":"Dataset documenting mobility between rural areas and cities at the start of the 1960s, including typical travel distances and transport means."},{"title":"Cross-Border Travel between Finland and Sweden 1969","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.90123","justification":"Survey of cross-border trips at the end of the decade, with information on travel purposes and transport modes for journeys between Finland and Sweden."},{"title":"Student Travel and Transport to School in Finland 1961","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.01234","justification":"Education-related survey including detailed questions on how Finnish students travelled to school (walking, cycling, bus, etc.) in 1961, a specific subset of transport and travel behaviour."}]}
